heading: Auto-enrollment option for retirement savings options provided by small employers
label: 45T Auto-enrollment option for retirement savings options provided by small employers
notes: Effective DateSection applicable to taxable years beginning after , see , set out as an Effective Date of 2019 Amendment note under .Dec. 31, 2019section 105(d) of Pub. L. 116–94section 38 of this title
amendments: Effective DateSection applicable to taxable years beginning after , see , set out as an Effective Date of 2019 Amendment note under .Dec. 31, 2019section 105(d) of Pub. L. 116–94section 38 of this title

children.text: $500 for any taxable year occurring during the credit period, and
zero for any other taxable year.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The credit period with respect to any eligible employer is the 3-taxable-year period beginning with the first taxable year for which the employer includes an eligible automatic contribution arrangement (as defined in section 414(w)(3)) in a qualified employer plan (as defined in section 4972(d)) sponsored by the employer.

children.heading: Maintenance of arrangement
children.label: 2 Maintenance of arrangement
children.text: No taxable year with respect to an employer shall be treated as occurring within the credit period unless the arrangement described in paragraph (1) is included in the plan for such year.

children.heading: Eligible employer
children.label: c Eligible employer
children.text: For purposes of this section, the term “eligible employer” has the meaning given such term in section 408(p)(2)(C)(i).
